subject: Re:
body:
i accept

----- Original Message ----
From: Catherine Derby <catherinederby@hotmail.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, January 8, 2007 4:57:17 PM
Subject: 

Mr. Epstein,

I am sick over what happened.  I love working for Ghislaine and contrary to 
what it looks like I take this job very seriously and plan to work my ass 
off.  I'm dedicated to ghislaine and the job.  I would NEVER intentionally 
screw this up, never.  I need this job, I'd never put that at risk!  I 
promised you I wouldn't let you down, that is the number one reason I 
wouldn't mess it up.  You've been incredibly good to me and this was not 
meant to happen.  I am so sorry.  Very sorry.

See how my life is crap at times!  haha.

Catherine
